text: The purpose of mousing a hook is to

options.text: Prevent the hook from getting fouled
Increase the SWL of the hook
Prevent the sling from slipping out
Reduce the swing of the object

explanation: Mousing a hook, typically with wire or seizing, is a safety procedure to prevent the load or sling from accidentally slipping out of the hook's throat. This is particularly important when the load is not directly attached or under dynamic conditions.
